name.zh: 工具之道 - 第十八章

itemName.en: .338 Lapua Magnum AP ammo pack (20 pcs)

itemName.zh: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM 栓动狙击步枪
itemName.en: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM bolt-action sniper rifle

itemName.zh: AI AXMC GTAC AR-type手枪式握把转换器
itemName.en: AI AXMC GTAC AR-type pistol grip adapter

itemName.zh: SWORD International Mk-18 .338 LM 精确射手步枪 ★
itemName.en: SWORD International Mk-18 .338 LM marksman rifle

description.zh:
这次是私人事务，是要送给我朋友的礼物。一把半自动 .338 Lapua Magnum 步枪最合适不过了。

这枪需要配两脚架，镜子方面要装 Nightforce 的 7-35 倍镜。枪口初速得有 890 米/秒以上，弹匣至少能装十发。明白了吗？那就交给你了。

MK-18 要求：
 - 后坐力总和小于 890
 - 重量小于 9.0 公斤
 - 人机功效 25 或更高
 - 耐久度至少 95 %
 - 弹匣容量 10 或更多
 - 膛口初速 达到 890 M/s 或更多
 - 任意 脚架
 - Nightforce ATACR 7-35x56步枪瞄准镜
description.en:
This is a personal matter again, it's a gift for a friend of mine. A semi-automatic .338 Lapua Magnum rifle would be ideal.

It should have a bipod and be equipped with a nightforce 7-35x scope. A muzzle velocity of at least eight-hundred-ninety meters should do the job, additionally it should hold at least ten rounds in the magazine. Got it? Alright then.

MK-18 Requirements :
 - Recoil Sum less than 890
 - Weight less than 9.0 KG
 - Ergonomics 25 or higher
 - Durability higher than 95 %
 - Magazine Capacity of 10 or more
 - Muzzle Velocity of 890 M/s or more
 - A Bipod
 - Nightforce ATACR 7-35x56 34mm Riflescope
